queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis investigates the relationship between no known savings account status and decreased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Research examines the absence of a checking account as a determinant of credit risk and increased default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical assessment evaluates the impact of savings balances below 100 DM on the mitigation of credit risk exposure.
